summary: Retest of the CRITICAL SPA navigation crash (iteration_1) after multi-layered fix. ALL nav links from `/` now navigate cleanly with zero pageerrors; #root stays populated; destination data-testid renders. Reverse navigation works. FocusCarousel centre peak now exceeds the 1.18 target. All 6 FullscreenCarousel chapter headings present. The CRITICAL bug is RESOLVED and the LOW priority FocusCarousel scale is also resolved.
verified_fixes: nav-link-our-work from / -> /our-work : our-work-page visible, root children=1, 0 pageerrors
nav-link-services from / -> /services : services-page visible, root children=1, 0 pageerrors
nav-link-process from / -> /process : process-page visible, root children=1, 0 pageerrors
nav-link-about-us from / -> /about : about-us-page visible, root children=1, 0 pageerrors
nav-link-contact from / -> /#contact : contact-section visible, root children=1, 0 pageerrors
Reverse /about -> / via rihara logo : home re-mounts, hero/section visible, 0 pageerrors
FocusCarousel centre peak scale: 1.207 over ~11s sample (target >= 1.18) — PASS
FullscreenCarousel: all 6 chapter headings present (The Arched Welcome, Marble & Fluted Oak, Daylight Drawing Room, The Working Heart, Linen & Light, The Bronze Sanctuary)
test_methodology: Used add_init_script to seed sessionStorage 'rihara-intro-seen'='1' before each goto so the 3D door intro is skipped. Listened to pageerror events. For every nav target: goto /, wait 1.8s, click nav link, wait 2s, then assert (a) dest data-testid visible, (b) #root.children.length > 0, (c) no pageerrors. FocusCarousel scale sampled every 500ms x 22 (~11s) reading computed transform matrix[0] across all focus cards.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix is correctly layered: GallerySection now uses pinType:'transform' (avoids pin-spacer DOM mutation that was conflicting with React reconciliation); Home.jsx kills all ScrollTriggers on unmount; App.js RouteHandler kills triggers on every route change before refresh. This belt-and-braces approach is appropriate for GSAP/React integration and should be kept.

Minor (not blocking): ScrollTrigger.getAll().forEach(t=>t.kill()) in RouteHandler runs before the new route mounts AND on first render; consider gating it with a useRef to skip the initial mount for marginal perf, but current behavior is safe.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRITICAL navigation crash from iteration_1 is fully resolved. Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_rihara_api.py. If further regression needed, focus on contact form e2e (POST /api/contact integration) and mobile viewport nav.
rca of the issue: Resolved. Root cause was GSAP ScrollTrigger pin:true creating a pin-spacer DOM wrapper outside React's reconciliation tree on GallerySection; on Home unmount React failed removeChild. Mitigation applied: (1) pinType:'transform' avoids pin-spacer insertion; (2) Home unmount + RouteHandler both kill all ScrollTriggers defensively. Verified via 5 nav links + reverse + cross-route, zero pageerrors observed.
